channel.title: about_me on rahuldevajji
channel.description: Recent content in about_me on rahuldevajji

item.title: rahuldevajji/about
item.description: What am I up to right now? Research Assistant at the healthy cities lab Research on localized climate zone classification using Google Earth Engine Connect with me: Github LinkedIn Email at rdevajji (at) iu.edu Resume This browser does not support PDFs. Please download the PDF to view it: Download PDF. View as image If the PDF preview doesn’t work for you, you may download it instead by clicking on this link.

item.title: rahuldevajji.com
item.description: Hi, I’m Rahul And I’m an Informatics PhD. student at Indiana University Bloomington majoring in Health Informatics. I listen to podcasts and read a lot of sci-fi. I’m tracking all the books I’ve read recently here, hopefully I’ll also start writing about those books. I also write posts about general tech stuff on my blog. Quick links Browse by tags Books Connect with me: Github LinkedIn Email at rdevajji (at) iu.
